commands.payload:
Usage: asb queue [command]

Asb.Cli

Commands:
  peek    
  read    

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: asb queue peek [--instance <String>] [--queue <String>] [--dlq] [--max <Int32>] [--file <String>] [--help]

Options:
  -i, --instance <String>    The key used to get the azure service bus connection string. (Required)
  -q, --queue <String>       The queue in which to use in this operation ('~' will be replaced with `/`). (Required)
  --dlq                      Whether or not to use the dead letter queue in this operation.
  --max <Int32>              The maximum amount of messages used in this operation
  --file <String>            The relative file path to write the messages used in this operation.
  -h, --help                 Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: asb queue read [--instance <String>] [--queue <String>] [--dlq] [--max <Int32>] [--file <String>] [--timeout <Int32>] [--clear] [--help]

Options:
  -i, --instance <String>    The key used to get the azure service bus connection string. (Required)
  -q, --queue <String>       The queue in which to use in this operation ('~' will be replaced with `/`). (Required)
  --dlq                      Whether or not to use the dead letter queue in this operation.
  --max <Int32>              The maximum amount of messages used in this operation
  --file <String>            The relative file path to write the messages used in this operation.
  --timeout <Int32>          The time in seconds in which this operation will run before being cancelled.
  --clear                    Whether or not the message entity is being cleared down.
  -h, --help                 Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: asb topic peek [--instance <String>] [--topic <String>] [--subscription <String>] [--dlq] [--max <Int32>] [--file <String>] [--help]

Options:
  -i, --instance <String>        The key used to get the azure service bus connection string. (Required)
  -t, --topic <String>           The topic to be used in this operation ('~' will be replaced with `/`). (Required)
  -s, --subscription <String>    The subscription name to use in this operation. (Required)
  --dlq                          Whether or not to use the dead letter queue in this operation.
  --max <Int32>                  The maximum amount of messages used in this operation
  --file <String>                The relative file path to write the messages used in this operation.
  -h, --help                     Show help message
